name: Beef Ragout Country-Style
recipeIngredient: 3 large Onions, each cut into 8 pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim excess fat from beef cubes.
2. Brown the beef cubes in hot oil in a Dutch oven over high heat (in 2 batches, if necessary).
3. Add onions and brown lightly.
4. Add garlic.
5. Stir in tomatoes, 3 tbsp parsley, thyme, salt, and pepper.
6. Add wine and beef broth to just cover; bring to boil.
7. Reduce heat; cover and simmer for 1 hour.
8. Add mushrooms; continue to simmer covered for 1 to 1 1/2 hours or until beef is tender.
9. If desired, reduce liquid uncovered for the last 10 minutes of cooking.
10. Add olives and stir through.
11. Stir in remaining parsley.
12. Serve ragout with hot cooked noodles. Garnish with additional parsley.
Makes 4 to 6 servings.
